normalization.notes: Store Glagolitic text in NFC and preserve manuscript transcription conventions. Do not normalize Glagolitic letters to Cyrillic or Latin equivalents.

segmentation.pedagogical_units: Glagolitic letters, historic vowel letters, yer signs, titlo or abbreviation marks, and transliteration labels
segmentation.notes: Printed Glagolitic text can be handled as left-to-right alphabetic text but manuscript abbreviations, liturgical context, and Church Slavonic pronunciation need review.
